metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, and REAPER insertion workflow.

version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Unified the product around one compact, responsive interface. - Removed frames from time metrics and Pitch/Rate/Gain controls. - Kept borders only on interactive icon buttons. - Increased lower-panel safety space to prevent control clipping. - Added the official PsyReaSFX ReaPack repository channel. - Aligned all lower metric-row text to one baseline.
